guidances.given_in: Q4 FY26 investor release/secondary coverage, ~21 May 2026
guidances.note: Management guided FY27 capex of approximately INR15-20cr (midpoint ~INR17.5cr used here), expected to drive growth over the subsequent two years. Sourced to secondary coverage (tradebrains.in) of the Q4 FY26 investor release/call -- the primary transcript PDF could not be retrieved in this run (see sourcing note in report).

guidances.given_in: Q4 FY26 investor release/secondary coverage, ~21 May 2026
guidances.note: Management indicated the humanoid robotics business (currently in prototyping/validation phase with customers) is expected to make an important contribution in FY27. Sourced to secondary coverage; primary transcript not retrieved in this run.

Company is in process of obtaining AS9100D certification (aerospace manufacturing quality standard), described as an intense process expected to take about one year. Sourced to secondary coverage; primary transcript not retrieved in this run.
FY26 revenue from operations of INR219.54cr (+53.8% YoY) and net profit of INR27.01cr (+61.2% YoY) -- completed full-year outcomes, per company exchange disclosure.
